title: 3D minerals
body:
this texture pack change minerals in Minecraft to 3D

3D features for:

https://youtube.com/shorts/ccRae4PcdpQ?si=jiPanNUbvdBrFwXt

-diamond

-emerald

-iron ingot-nugget-raw

-gold ingot-nugget-raw

-copper ingot-raw

-amethyst shard

-coal

-resin clump

![3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d81790ffb8b03c52f5e62c9fb558d145f0508ee.jpeg)

update v1.1

-change textures emerald and diamond
-add redstone


![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97d21d79db0c495468b80857028d0f8de4b83bd4.png)
